name: Philly No-Bake Summer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 ready-to-use graham cracker crumb crust (6 oz or 9 in)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Gently stir in the whipped topping.
3. Spoon the mixture into the crust.
4. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
5. Top with fresh fruit or your favorite pie filling.
6. Makes 8 servings.
